title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient-centered health care for all ages. Services include annual exams, care for acute and chronic conditions, sports physicals, mental health evaluation, counseling, and health screenings. Provides assistance applying for OHP. 801 Pacific Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm (503) 842-3900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-3900 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Limited same-day appointments available. FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: General Medical Care Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Public Clinics Sports Participation Physical Examinations Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEDICATION ASSISTED TREATMENT FOR SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER
